sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49966" key="i(eraki/dion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἱερᾱκ-ίδιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n49966.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">statuette of a hawk</tr_>, Roussel <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Cultes Egyptiens</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4083.tlg001:219" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">219</biblScope> </bibl> (Delos, <date TEIform="date">ii B.C.</date>).</sense> </entryFree>
